cases.name: empty-runtime-boundary
cases.summary: No TaskPackage or TaskRuntimeView boundary is added.

cases.name: silent-unsupported-field
cases.summary: Unsupported parsed runtime semantics are accepted without a fail-closed runtime capability issue.

cases.name: runtime-view-without-alias-drift
cases.summary: TaskRuntimeView exists, but native/compatibility alias drift is not detected.

cases.name: gold-runtime-boundary
cases.summary: TaskPackage owns selected runtime view, runtime support issues, and compatibility alias drift checks.
